|affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]<ref name="Holovid">In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', when Surik fixes the [[battered protocol droid]] on Dantooine after disembarking the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', it reveals a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] of Masters Vandar Tokare and Vrook Lamar, in which Lamar mentions his Padawan.</ref>

{{Quote|Today I caught her in a heated argument with my Padawan!|Vrook Lamar to Vandar Tokare, in a conversation recorded by a [[Battered protocol droid|protocol droid]] regarding an argument between Meetra Surik and Lamar's Padawan|<ref name="KOTR II">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
A '''Padawan''' was [[Jedi training/Legends|apprenticed]] to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vrook Lamar]] in the [[Time/Legends|time]] period before the [[Mandalorian Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]]. While the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] was at the [[Jedi Enclave]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], the student engaged in an intense debate with fellow Padawan<ref name="Holovid" /> [[Meetra Surik]].<ref name="Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref> As a result, Lamar sought to have [[Meetra Surik's Jedi Master|Surik's Master]] discipline her, but the Jedi refused. After this, Lamar brought the issue up to Master [[Vandar Tokare]], who also refused to take any action.<ref name="Holovid" />

Lamar's Padawan debated with<ref name="Holovid" /> Surik<ref name="Revan" /> to the point where Lamar noted that the argument was heated. As a Jedi trainee, the Padawan was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="Holovid" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vrook Lamar's Padawan was first mentioned in [[Obsidian Entertainment]]'s [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.<ref name="KOTR II" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
